content: Remote terminal over WebSocket 2025: xterm.js (now @xterm/xterm) is the standard browser terminal emulator — used by VS Code, Proxmox, Nomad, Jupyter. node-pty (Microsoft-maintained) forks pseudoterminals in Node.js. Pattern: browser connects via WebSocket, server uses node-pty to spawn shell, bidirectional data flows through ws pipe. node-pty has native bindings (prebuilt binaries available via @node-pty/prebuilt-multiplatform). xterm migrated to @xterm scope — old xterm package deprecated. Add @xterm/addon-fit for terminal resizing, @xterm/addon-web-links for clickable links.
